get.description: This call queries for the list of Directors for a selected System

parameters.name: resume_token
parameters.description: The unique token of a previous cached result

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The max number of instances to be returned

parameters.name: limit_kb
parameters.description: The max size of each page in KBs

parameters.name: expiration_delay_secs
parameters.description: The max time a cached result will be stored

get.description:
This call queries for the list of Ip Interfaces for a selected System. 
 Due to the presence of special characters which would affect object lookup and filtering, the ID is a Base64 encoding which includes the director|port|ip_address|network_id|, i.e. "OR-3C|8|192.168.1.2|11" equals "T1ItM0N8OHwxOTIuMTY4LjEuMnwxMQ"

parameters.name: resume_token
parameters.description: The unique token of a previous cached result

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The max number of instances to be returned

parameters.name: limit_kb
parameters.description: The max size of each page in KBs

parameters.name: expiration_delay_secs
parameters.description: The max time a cached result will be stored

get.description:
This call queries for the list of Ip Routes for a selected System. 

 Due to the presence of special characters which would affect object lookup and filtering, the ID is a Base64 encoding which includes the director|destination_ip_address|prefix_length|network_id, i.e. "OR-3C|192.168.1.2|24|11" equals "T1ItM0N8MTkyLjE2OC4xLjJ8MjR8MTE"

parameters.name: resume_token
parameters.description: The unique token of a previous cached result

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The max number of instances to be returned

parameters.name: limit_kb
parameters.description: The max size of each page in KBs

parameters.name: expiration_delay_secs
parameters.description: The max time a cached result will be stored

get.summary: List Categories and associated KPI Metrics
get.description: This endpoint will return a collection of possible categories for the selected system and their associated KPI metrics

get.summary: Get Bulk collection of KPI metrics for all instances of a specified Category for the lastAvailable timestamp
get.description: This endpoint will return a bulk collection of KPI metrics for a specified Category for the last available timestamp"

parameters.name: expiration_delay_secs

get.description: This call queries for the list of Ports for a selected System. Due to the presence of special characters which would affect object lookup and filtering, the ID is a Base64 encoding of the director ID and port number, i.e. "OR-3C|8" equals "T1ItM0N8OA".

parameters.description: The unique token of a previous cached result

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The max number of instances to be returned

parameters.name: limit_kb

parameters.name: expiration_delay_secs
parameters.description: The max time a cached result will be stored

metro.description: Specifies if the RDF Group volumes are configured for Metro or not

async.description: Specifies if the RDF Group volumes are configured for Asynchronous mode or not

cap_gb.description: The total Capacity of the RDF Group

num_of_ports.description: The number of Ports associated with the RDF Group

ports.description: The Port(s) associated with the RDF Group

witness.title: witness
witness.description: Specifies if the RDF Group is a Witness or not

witness_protected_physical.title: witness_protected_physical
witness_protected_physical.description: Specifies if the RDF Group is protected by a physical Witness or not

witness_protected_virtual.title: witness_protected_virtual
witness_protected_virtual.description: Specifies if the RDF Group is protected by a virtual Witness or not

witness_configured.title: witness_configured
witness_configured.description: Indicates that the RDF group is configured to use witness. This means that when the establish/restore was issued both the R1 and R2 sides had a witness RDF group that was both defined and online to the same witness System.

witness_effective.title: witness_effective
witness_effective.description: Specifies if the RDF Group is protected by a Witness or not

bias_configured.title: bias_configured
bias_configured.description: Indicates that the RDF group is configured to use bias. This means that when the establish/restore was issued the use bias option was given.

bias_effective.title: bias_effective
bias_effective.description: Indicates that the RDF group is bias protected.

witness_degraded.title: witness_degraded
witness_degraded.description: Indicates that the RDF group is witness protected but the witness System can only be reached by either the R1 or the R2 System, but not by both

vasa_group.title: vasa_group
vasa_group.description: Indicates that the RDF group is a VASA replication group

link_limbo.title: link_limbo
link_limbo.description: Indicates that the RDF group Link Limbo value

hardware_compression.title: hardware_compression
hardware_compression.description: Indicates that Hardware Compression is enabled for this RDF Group

software_compression.title: software_compression
software_compression.description: Indicates that Software Compression is enabled for this RDF Group

device_polarity.title: device_polarity
device_polarity.description: Indicates that the RDF group Volumes(s) polarity [RDF1,RDF2,Mixed]

id.title: id
id.description: The Base64(no padding) identifier of the Port which includes the director|port e.g., "OR-3C|8" equals "T1ItM0N8OA"

session_uncommitted_tracks.title: session_uncommitted_tracks
session_uncommitted_tracks.description: The number of tracks not yet committed in the SRDF/A session

r1_to_r2_lag_time.title: r1_to_r2_lag_time
r1_to_r2_lag_time.description: How long behind the R1 is the R2 side

duration_of_last_cycle_secs.title: duration_of_last_cycle_secs
duration_of_last_cycle_secs.description: Amount of time (seconds) that the last cycle lasted. If the R1 side is reachable, this is the number of seconds the cycle was the Capture (active) cycle. On the R2 side, this is 0 for ucode >= 5773

average_cycle_time_secs.title: average_cycle_time_secs
average_cycle_time_secs.description: Average cycle time (seconds) When the R1 side is reachable, it is the average time that a cycle spends as as the Capture (active) cycle. This includes the overhead of deciding to do the switch. If the R1 is not reachable, it is the average time that a cycle spends as the Apply (active) cycle on the R2 side

duration_of_last_transmit_cycle_secs.title: duration_of_last_transmit_cycle_secs
duration_of_last_transmit_cycle_secs.description: How long the last transmit cycle took

transmit_queue_depth.title: transmit_queue_depth
transmit_queue_depth.description: Number of cycles waiting to be transmitted to the R2 side. It does not include the Capture (active) cycle. This field is only valid if the R1 side is reachable, else it is 0. In Legacy mode, this will always be 1 on the R1 side

transmit_idle_state.title: transmit_idle_state
transmit_idle_state.description: Identifies if transmit idle is enabled or disabled on this side

transmit_idle_time.title: transmit_idle_time
transmit_idle_time.description: The time the transmit cycle has been idle

consistency_protection.title: consistency_protection
consistency_protection.description: Indicates if consistency protections is enabled or not

dse_active.title: dse_active
dse_active.description: Is DSE active for the SRDF Group

dse_threshold.title: dse_threshold
dse_threshold.description: Indicates the DSE Threshold for the SRDF Group

dse_autostart.title: dse_autostart
dse_autostart.description: Indicates whether DSE Autostart is active on the SRDF Group

session_priority.title: session_priority
session_priority.description: Indicates the SRDF/A session priority for the SRDF Group

consistency_exempt_volumes.title: consistency_exempt_volumes
consistency_exempt_volumes.description: Indicates the SRDF/A session has volumes which are consistency exempt

last_action_timestamp_ms.description: The date the last action occurred on the clone

id.title: id
id.description: The Base64(no padding) identifier of the Volume Host Path which includes the volume|host e.g., "00123|host1" equals "MDAxMjN8aG9zdDE"

consistent_lun_address.description: The host lun address of the volume if consistent across all Initiator and Director port combinations for this host, otherwise null

all_initiator_paths_on_fabric.description: specifies if the initiators through all ports are on fabric

all_initiator_paths_logged_in.description: specifies if the initiators through all ports are logged in
